SEARCH

Package compiler.simulation

package compiler.simulation
  • Class
    Description
    Action
    Immutable runtime action produced by a critter interpreter.
    ActionType
    Runtime action types supported by critters.
    Constants
    Global simulation constants loaded from constants.txt.
    Controller
    Sequential simulation driver.
    Critter
    Mutable critter state tracked by the world and controller.
    HexCoordinate
    Immutable doubled-coordinate position in the hex grid.
    HexDirection
    The six doubled-coordinate directions used by the hex grid.
    HexMath
    Hex-grid utility methods.
    HexState
    Immutable state of a single world hex.
    InterpreterVisitor
    Produces the next runtime action for a critter.
    ProgramCritterInterpreter
    Interprets a parsed AST program for one critter.
    World
    Thread-safe hex world snapshot.
